overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai in red armor running along a misty beach at sunset. The character explores the coastline with rocky cliffs and snow-capped mountains in the background, encountering a deer in the shallow water before running toward the bright setting sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty coastal beach with rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the beach exploring the coastline, sword visible on back

entered.detail: tall reddish-brown rocky cliff formation lining the left side of the beach
calm ocean water with low mist hovering above the surface
distant mountain range with visible snow on the peaks
tree-covered hills rising behind the beach

segments.scene_description: The samurai runs along a misty pebble beach with rocky cliffs on the left and forested hills in the distance. Snow-capped mountains are visible in the background as mist rises from the calm ocean water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach with shallow water pools

events.description: a deer appears standing in the shallow ocean water near the shore

agents.ego_description: running past a deer standing in the shallow water, maintaining pace along the shoreline

notable_agents.action: deer standing still in the shallow water, facing toward the shore

entered.detail: large rock formation jutting out from the water near the shore
calm shallow pools of ocean water along the beach edge

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the shore, the samurai passes a deer standing calmly in the shallow water. The rocky cliffs fall behind as the beach opens up to reveal more of the ocean and distant rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach facing sunset over ocean

events.description: character turns to face the setting sun directly, creating bright glare and silhouette effect
character slows from running to walking as they approach the water's edge to observe the sunset

agents.ego_description: running toward the setting sun then slowing to walk and take in the panoramic ocean view

entered.detail: bright golden sun sitting low on the horizon over the ocean
rocky outcroppings visible in the distance across the water
white foam from gentle waves lapping at the sandy shore

segments.scene_description: The character runs toward a brilliant golden sunset, which creates a strong backlight and silhouette effect. The scene opens into a wide beach with waves lapping at the shore as the sun dominates the horizon, and the character slows to absorb the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a misty coastline that gradually opens into a brilliant, sun-drenched beach. It begins with a samurai running across a pebble shore flanked by rocky cliffs and forested hills, while mist rises from the calm ocean beneath distant snow-capped mountains. As the character continues forward, the cliffs recede and the beach expands, passing a deer standing calmly in the shallow water. The scene then shifts toward the horizon as the lighting transforms into a deep gold, casting the samurai in silhouette against a powerful backlight. Finally, the view opens wide to the crashing waves of the shore as the character slows down before the dominating glow of the setting sun.
